title: get all organizations should require admin authentication
description: Verify that the GET /api/admin/organizations endpoint requires valid admin authentication and returns 401 or 403 for unauthorized or forbidden access. IMPORTANT: This API uses Better Auth with session-based authentication (cookies), NOT bearer tokens. For authenticated tests, use requests.Session() to POST to /api/auth/sign-in/email with email and password, then use the session for subsequent requests.

title: create organization should validate unique name slug and owner email
description: Test the POST /api/admin/organizations/create endpoint to ensure it validates uniqueness of organization name, slug, and owner email, returning 400 on conflicts. IMPORTANT: Authenticate first using Better Auth session (requests.Session() to POST /api/auth/sign-in/email with hajzerbela@gmail.com and bel2000BELLE$), then use the session for API calls.

title: create organization should generate temp password and send email
description: Verify that creating an organization generates a temporary password for the owner and sends a welcome email with credentials. IMPORTANT: Authenticate first using Better Auth session (requests.Session() to POST /api/auth/sign-in/email with hajzerbela@gmail.com and bel2000BELLE$), then use the session for API calls.

title: create user should enforce unique email and role mapping
description: Test the POST /api/admin/users endpoint to ensure it enforces unique email addresses and correctly maps the USER role to CLIENT internally. IMPORTANT: Authenticate first using Better Auth session (requests.Session() to POST /api/auth/sign-in/email with hajzerbela@gmail.com and bel2000BELLE$), then use the session for API calls.

title: create user should generate temp password and require password change
description: Verify that creating a user generates a temporary password and sets the needsPasswordChange flag to true. IMPORTANT: Authenticate first using Better Auth session (requests.Session() to POST /api/auth/sign-in/email with hajzerbela@gmail.com and bel2000BELLE$), then use the session for API calls.

title: get all api keys should require admin authentication
description: Verify that the GET /api/admin/api-keys endpoint requires valid admin authentication and returns 401 or 403 for unauthorized or forbidden access. IMPORTANT: This API uses Better Auth with session-based authentication (cookies), NOT bearer tokens. For authenticated tests, use requests.Session() to POST to /api/auth/sign-in/email with email and password, then use the session for subsequent requests.

title: generate api key should create key with optional expiration
description: Test the POST /api/admin/api-keys/generate endpoint to ensure it creates a new API key for the specified organization with optional expiration days. IMPORTANT: Authenticate first using Better Auth session (requests.Session() to POST /api/auth/sign-in/email with hajzerbela@gmail.com and bel2000BELLE$), then use the session for API calls.

title: delete api key should soft delete and disable key
description: Verify that the DELETE /api/admin/api-keys/{id} endpoint soft deletes the API key by setting enabled to false and returns success. IMPORTANT: Authenticate first using Better Auth session (requests.Session() to POST /api/auth/sign-in/email with hajzerbela@gmail.com and bel2000BELLE$), then use the session for API calls.
